name: Rena(mommy)
description:
A big renamon mommy. Don’t mind my lazy naming lol.

Not as complex as my previous bots but still is using new ideas for improving the quality of my bots.

She isn’t sexually based, more like a nurturing figure you can talk to but it isn’t set in stone.

Btw, your height will almost always be around 6 feet tall due to the nature of a character like this.
creator: Prima
